The following events took place in '''3970 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Argazda/Legends|Argazda's]] [[Governor/Legends|Provisional Governor]] [[Myrial]] declares the [[Kanz sector/Legends|Kanz sector]] independent, renaming it the [[Argazdan Redoubt]] and instigating the bloody [[Kanz Disorders/Legends|Kanz Disorders]]. {{Circa}}<ref name="Atlas" />

==Births==
*[[Mission Vao]] {{Circa}}<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] originally placed the beginning of the Kanz Disorders around [[3995 BBY]], but it was later moved to 3670 BBY.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}} {{Imo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2006-10-31 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
